---
title: "Week 6 — Working with Real Data"
subtitle: "ECON 3209 · Kerala Agricultural University"
---

## Week 6 Overview

Handle real-world data workflows — importing from files and APIs, exploratory data analysis, and a full data-cleaning case study.

| Lecture | Topic | Slides |
|---------|-------|--------|
| Lecture 1 | Import, Export & APIs | [Open →](lecture-01.qmd) |
| Lecture 2 | Exploratory Data Analysis | [Open →](lecture-02.qmd) |
| Lecture 3 | Data Cleaning Case Study | [Open →](lecture-03.qmd) |
